plugins.name: ai-cli-optout
plugins.description: Opt out of telemetry across every locally installed AI CLI and AI-enabled IDE, plus macOS/Windows OS-level privacy surfaces.

plugins.name: db-guardrails
plugins.description: Stop AI coding agents from accidentally emptying your database. An always-on hook blocks destructive DB commands across 15+ frameworks, plus a stack-aware installer for database-level privilege separation and framework boot guards.

plugins.name: obsidian-project-vault
plugins.description: Set up, migrate, audit, and operate an Obsidian vault as an LLM Wiki — a persistent, compounding knowledge base maintained by Claude Code.

plugins.name: enduser-handbook
plugins.description: Generate and maintain a Diátaxis-structured end-user handbook for any project from a per-project profile, with live screenshot capture and ongoing completeness audits; ships Obsidian-vault and static-Markdown publish adapters.

plugins.name: cc-usage-coach
plugins.description: Personalized, behavior-aware analysis of where your Claude Code (Max/Pro) usage-limit tokens go, with ranked, low-effort ways to use fewer — computed entirely from your local session logs. Python measures; Claude concludes.
